explicitMods: Adds 12 to 18 Cold Damage to Spells
+1 to Level of all Minion Skills

explicitMods: 25% chance to gain [Onslaught|Onslaught] on Killing [HitDamage|Hits] with this Weapon

explicitMods: When you kill a [Rarity|Rare] monster, you gain its [MonsterModifiers|Modifiers] for 60 seconds

explicitMods: 8.2 Life Regeneration per second per Socket filled
+10% to all [Resistances|Elemental Resistances] per Socket filled

items.name: Onslaught Star
explicitMods: [Allies|Allies] in your [Presence|Presence] deal 19 to 27 added [Attack|Attack] [Fire|Fire] Damage

items.name: Sire of Shards
explicitMods:
[Spell|Spells] fire 4 additional [Projectile|Projectiles]
[Spell|Spells] fire [Projectile|Projectiles] in a circle

items.name: Defiance of Destiny
explicitMods: Recover 27% of Missing Life before being [HitDamage|Hit] by an Enemy

items.name: Blistering Bond
explicitMods: You take [Fire] Damage instead of [Physical] Damage from [Bleeding]

items.name: Fury of the King
explicitMods: Skills which require [Glory] generate 5 [Glory] every 2 seconds
